scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner kitchen matching image1 layout. Dark-complexioned Latino male dishwasher (image2) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script glances over from the sink and shakes his head slowly, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in cream cable-knit sweater and dark wash jeans who stands in the doorway facing him. Fluorescent kitchen lighting.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner kitchen matching image1 layout. Dark-complexioned Latino male dishwasher (image2) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script leans on the edge of the sink watching with suds dripping from his rubber gloves, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script who stands nearby facing him. In the background: male chef (image4) in white double-breasted chef coat, black-and-white checkered pants, and white chef hat checking the stove. Warm kitchen morning light.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner kitchen matching image1 layout.
